member.name: T:Pod.Web.Center.Authentication.ApiKeySecretValidator
member.summary: Validate Http Requests for Authentication with an API Key/Secret

member.name: M:Pod.Web.Center.Authentication.ApiKeySecretValidator.Validate(Pod.Web.Authentication.ApiKeySecret.IApiKeySecretRequest)
member.summary: Validates an Authorization Request for amx Scheme. Validates Route, ApiKey, Hash/Data. Prevents Replay Attacks

member.name: M:Pod.Web.Center.Authentication.ApiKeySecretValidator.IsValidRequest(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the Authentication Request is valid
member.param: The Public Key from the Request
The HMAC SHA 256 hash signature as Base64 string
The nonce used by the client that was used in creating the signature
The timestamp used by the client that was used in creating the signature

member.name: M:Pod.Web.Center.Authentication.ApiKeySecretValidator.IsTimestampValid(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the Request is not to far off by time from the server and checks if it was not already once processed

member.name: M:Pod.Web.Center.Authentication.ApiKeySecretValidator.ComputeMd5Hash(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Computes the Md5 Hash from a stream
member.returns: The hash as bytes or null

member.name: M:Pod.Web.Center.Authentication.ApiKeySecretValidator.GetBytes(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Reads Bytes from an Input Stream with undefined length to a memory stream and returns a byte array when the Input stream is completely read
member.returns: The input streams content as byte array

member.name: T:Pod.Web.Center.Authentication.ApiKeySecretResponse
member.summary: Authentication Validation Response

member.name: P:Pod.Web.Center.Authentication.ApiKeySecretResponse.IsSuccess
member.summary: Indicates if the Authentication Succeeded

member.name: P:Pod.Web.Center.Authentication.ApiKeySecretResponse.IsInvalidSignature
member.summary: Indicates if all was ok except that the signature did not match

member.name: P:Pod.Web.Center.Authentication.ApiKeySecretResponse.ClaimsPrincipal
member.summary: The authenticated Identity

member.name: M:Pod.Web.Center.PodIdentityServiceCollectionExtensions.AddIdentityCore``2(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds and configures the identity system for the specified User and Role types.
member.typeparam: The type representing a User in the system.
The type representing a Role in the system.
member.param: The services available in the application.
member.returns: An for creating and configuring the identity system.

member.name: M:Pod.Web.Center.PodIdentityServiceCollectionExtensions.AddIdentityCore``2(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.IdentityOptions})
member.summary: Adds and configures the identity system for the specified User and Role types.
member.typeparam: The type representing a User in the system.
The type representing a Role in the system.
member.param: The services available in the application.
member.returns: An for creating and configuring the identity system.

member.name: M:Pod.Web.Center.UserExtensions.GetUserId(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal,System.Guid@)
member.summary: Will be available if the User is authenticated by a JWT/Bearer authentication
member.returns: true if user Id was found

member.name: M:Pod.Web.Center.UserExtensions.GetStationApiKeyData(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal,System.Guid@,System.Guid@)
member.summary: Will be available if the authentication was done with a
member.param: The Claims Principal set by the authentication
The User Id from the claim
The Station Id from the claim
member.returns: true if all values were found

member.name: T:Pod.Web.Center.ServicesHosted.ConnectionHealthServiceHosted
member.summary: Background service that checks periodically for Connections/Sessions that were not properly closed and handles them accordingly

member.name: M:Pod.Web.Center.ServicesHosted.ConnectionHealthServiceHosted.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Method for Background Service to perform work Will scan periodically for orphaned connections and clean their status. This is mainly needed for stations that closed their connection ungracefully and never come online afterwards

member.name: T:Pod.Web.Center.ServicesHosted.GrpcHostedServer
member.summary: Services that can be Hosted in Asp.Net Core that provides Grpc Services for clients

member.name: T:Pod.Web.Center.ServicesHosted.GrpcServicesServer
member.summary: Grpc Server providing multiple Services as , ,

member.name: T:Pod.Web.Center.ServicesHosted.SendEmailServiceHosted
member.summary: Background Service sending Emails from Templates

member.name: T:Pod.Web.Center.Swagger.ApiExplorerGroupPerVersionConvention
member.summary: This Method applies Conventions for the ApiExplorerGroups that are used by swagger to assign Controller Methods to Swagger Documents The default implementation inspects ApiDescription.GroupName and returns true if the value is either null OR equal to the requested document name.

member.name: T:Pod.Web.Center.Swagger.AuthorizationOperationFilter
member.summary: Filters Routes for the Authorize attribute and applies the authentication scheme and response for doc

member.name: T:Pod.Web.Center.Swagger.EnumDocumentFilter
member.summary: Add enum value descriptions to Swagger

member.name: T:Pod.Web.Center.TokenProvider.PasswordResetTokenProvider`1
member.summary: Subclass of DataProtectorTokenProvider to allow different settings for these providers

member.name: T:Pod.Web.Center.TokenProvider.EmailConfirmationTokenProvider`1
member.summary: Subclass of DataProtectorTokenProvider to allow different settings for these providers
